scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.pack: npm run build && zip -r Archive.zip package.json package-lock.json shared/dist shared/package.json server/dist server/package.json client/dist client/package.json fixo-builder-firebase-adminsdk-fbsvc-652e7036dc.json
